markdownRemark.html:
Monrada Chiewhawan

Monrada Chiewhawan is a dual-degree student pursuing the Doctor of Medicine and Master of Engineering (Biomedical Engineering) at the Faculty of Medicine Ramathibodi Hospital and the Department of Biomedical Engineering, Mahidol University.

She is a passionate learner driven by the goal of advancing AI for science and medicine, with recent work spanning clinical NLP, medical imaging, and scientific figure generation.

Selected Publications & Presentations

  • Chiewhawan, M., Limaroon, K., & Achakulvisut, T. (2026). LAMAR at MedExACT 2026: Agreement-Driven Large Language Model Ensembles for Clinical Decision Extraction from Discharge Summaries. Oral and poster presentation at MedExACT @ BioNLP ACL 2026.
  • Chiewhawan, M., Timklaypachara, W., Buabang, P., Aguilera, S., Bodduluri, S., & Achakulvisut, T. Assessing Prompt Insensitivity in Foundation Models for Radiological Image Segmentation. Poster presentation at RSNA Annual Meeting, Chicago, IL, USA, 2025.
  • Timklaypachara, W., Chiewhawan, M., Lekuthai, N., & Achakulvisut, T. (2025). Leveraging Author-Specific Context for Scientific Figure Caption Generation: 3rd SciCap Challenge. arXiv:2510.07993.
